finding: --project-dir flag in command table but absent from algorithm steps 1-4 and Section 7.2.
suggestion: Document --project-dir fully or remove from command table.

finding: Step 5 renames, step 6 skips if exists — wrong order. Check must come before rename.
suggestion: Reorder or combine into single atomic conditional step.

finding: Probe runs after CAS storage (step 5) — wasteful and late for failure detection.
suggestion: Move probe to between step 1 and step 3 for fail-fast behavior.

finding: Allegro writes installed.php before dumpautoload, but composer dumpautoload may regenerate installed.php, overwriting Allegro's version.
suggestion: Clarify whether installed.php is input to dumpautoload or may be overwritten. Test actual Composer behavior.

finding: Config precedence (CLI > env > default) stated only under store path in 5.1. Not general.
suggestion: Add general precedence statement in Section 10.

finding: Rule 4 references 'Section 6.3 step 2' for hardlink permissions but step 2 is stale cleanup. Should be step 3.
'Deferred cleanup in case of crash' — Go defer doesn't run on SIGKILL/OOM. Misleading.
suggestion: Clarify: deferred cleanup for normal exits. Leftover tmp dirs cleaned on next install run.

finding: --dry-run in commands table but not in Section 7.2, no behavior specified.
suggestion: Add to 7.2. Specify which steps run, output format, exit code.

finding: Exit 1 for archive extraction but no stderr message format specified for programmatic parsing.
Windows binary shipped but vendor/bin broken with no runtime warning.
suggestion: Add runtime warning on Windows at install completion.

finding: branch-alias map → aliases array transformation undefined.
suggestion: State: aliases = array() in MVP for both root and packages.
